signals.headline: XRP ETF Approvals Near Final Stage | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Approvals Near Final Stage | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP Exchange-Traded Fund approvals are entering their final approval stage, with at least six live ETFs already operational.[3] This institutional infrastructure has already driven $224 million in spot ETF inflows during the first week of April—the largest single-country-led inflow rebound since December.[3]

signals.headline: Powell Confirms Tariffs Drive Most Inflation Overshoot Amid Weakening Labor Market and Q1 GDP Slowdown** | YES | HIGH
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms Tariffs Drive Most Inflation Overshoot Amid Weakening Labor Market and Q1 GDP Slowdown** | YES | HIGH

Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell stated on December 10, 2025, that Trump's tariffs are causing "most of the inflation overshoot" above the 2% target, with goods inflation expected to peak in Q1 2026 absent further tariffs; non-tariff-affected inflation is already in the low 2%

signals.headline: Central Bank Integration Accelerating | YES | MEDIUM confidence**
signals.raw:
Central Bank Integration Accelerating | YES | MEDIUM confidence**

Central banks are increasingly integrating Ripple's payment rails for cross-border settlements as of April 2026.[1] However, specific institution announcements are not detailed in available sources.

signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Across XRP Ledger & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Across XRP Ledger & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ripple USD (RLUSD) has officially completed its full-scale rollout across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum as of mid-April 2026.[1] This represents a major institutional milestone that has triggered significant capital inflows into the XRP ecosystem.

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle Resolution | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Resolution | YES | HIGH confidence**

The long-standing SEC legal dispute with Ripple is now officially concluded and "in the rearview mirror."[1] This regulatory clarity has removed a major overhang on XRP adoption and paved the way for institutional participation.

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Integration Live | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Integration Live | YES | HIGH confidence**

Rakuten Wallet went live on April 15, 2026, establishing a new payment rail for XRP transactions.[3] This deployment coincided with XRP reaching $1.50 for the first time in 2026 on April 17.[3]
